learningObjectives.title: Understand TM master data fundamentals
learningObjectives.description: Explain why master data is essential for planning, execution and settlement in SAP TM.

learningObjectives.title: Identify core master data objects
learningObjectives.description: Recognize Business Partner, Location, Resource, Transportation Lane and related objects.

learningObjectives.title: Understand master data impact
learningObjectives.description: Describe how data quality influences route determination, optimization and freight settlement.

sections.title: Introduction to SAP TM Master Data

sections.content: Master data is the foundation of SAP Transportation Management. Every transportation planning, optimization, execution and settlement process depends on accurate master data. Incorrect or incomplete master data leads to planning failures, incorrect routing and freight settlement issues.

sections.title: Key Concept
sections.content: Without master data, SAP TM cannot determine locations, resources, carriers, routes or transportation costs.

ABC Manufacturing ships products from Hyderabad to Chennai. SAP TM identifies the Business Partner, determines the shipping and destination Locations, validates the Transportation Lane, checks available Resources and creates an optimized Freight Order.

sections.title: Real Project Example
sections.content: A logistics company corrected duplicate Location and Business Partner master data, reducing transportation planning errors by over 30% and improving optimizer performance.

sections.title: Interview Tip
sections.content: Remember the core TM master data objects: Business Partner, Location, Resource, Transportation Lane and Transportation Zone. These are asked in almost every SAP TM interview.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: Many beginners think Freight Units and Freight Orders are master data. They are transactional business documents, not master data.

items: Master data is the foundation of SAP TM.
Locations define pickup and delivery points.
Transportation Lanes define valid transportation paths.
